---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to a stable or preview SattLint surface
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

Use [SUPPORT.md](../../SUPPORT.md) and the [public support matrix](../../docs/references/public-support-matrix.md) first so it is clear whether the request targets a stable surface, a preview surface, or a new surface entirely.

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
Describe the workflow or pain point.

**What would you like SattLint to do?**
Describe the desired behavior or user experience.

**Which surface should own this?**
Call out whether this belongs to a stable surface, a preview surface, or a new surface.

**What workaround do you use today?**
Describe any current workaround, manual step, or related tool.

**Additional context**
Add examples, screenshots, sample files, or related links here.
